mapper.select: SELECT fileId, postId, boardId, originalName, savedName, filePath, fileSize, fileExt, sortOrder, createdUser, createdDate FROM board_file WHERE postId = #{postId} ORDER BY sortOrder, fileId
SELECT fileId, postId, boardId, originalName, savedName, filePath, fileSize, fileExt, sortOrder, createdUser, createdDate FROM board_file WHERE fileId = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_file (fileId, postId, boardId, originalName, savedName, filePath, fileSize, fileExt, sortOrder, createdUser) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{postId}, #{boardId}, #{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdUser})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_file WHERE fileId = #{fileId}
SELECT CONCAT('FILE', LPAD( COALESCE(CAST(SUBSTRING(MAX(fileId), 5) AS UNSIGNED), 0) + 1, 7, '0' )) AS nextFileId FROM board_file WHERE fileId REGEXP '^FILE[0-9]+$'
